overview.title: Settings Overview
overview.description: Changes apply immediately. Use this home to reach the formal settings flow for connections, memory strategy, and system status.

general.theme_description: Switch between light and dark theme.
general.domain_description: Choose the default domain for new analysis flows.

execution.automation_description: Allow the system to advance eligible tasks automatically.
execution.background_description: Keep reminders and automation active in the background.
execution.planning_description: Allow the system to fill in planning details when needed.

memory.remember_description: Keep long-term preferences that affect future defaults and recommendations.
memory.confirmation_description: Review inferred habits before they affect future behavior.
memory.daily_summary_description: Show daily summaries in Memory without turning them into long-term rules automatically.
memory.suggestions_description: Show suggested replies and quick suggestions in the conversation workspace.
memory.open_description: Review and manage formal memory content.

connections.ai_description: Open Connections & Data to configure provider, model, and API details.
connections.data_description: Review the data service status and configuration entry.

diagnostics.label: Advanced Diagnostics
diagnostics.description: Open checks, sync, extensions, and maintenance tools.

page.title: Connections & Data
page.subtitle: Edit AI and data-source settings directly in the current version and run formal connection checks here.

status_card.title: Connections & Data
status_card.description: The current version exposes AI and data-source settings directly and supports instant connection checks.

descriptions.model: The model used for formal responses.
descriptions.base_url: The compatible API base URL exposed directly in this version.
descriptions.api_key: The API key for the currently selected provider.
descriptions.server_url: The base URL for match and extension services.
descriptions.data_api_key: The API key used for the data service.

checks.ai_not_checked: AI connection has not been checked yet
checks.data_not_checked: Data connection has not been checked yet

page.title: Advanced & Diagnostics
page.subtitle: This page keeps the formal checks, sync actions, extension entry, and maintenance tools.

connection_checks.title: Connection Checks
connection_checks.description: Return to Connections & Data to run AI and data checks.

sync_status.title: Sync Status
sync_status.description: Review and trigger the formal sync actions exposed in this version.

extensions_sync.title: Extensions & Sync
extensions_sync.description: Sync recommended extensions and open Extension Management.

notification_checks.title: Notification Checks
notification_checks.description: Review notification permissions and reminder readiness.

automation_checks.title: Automation Checks
automation_checks.description: Confirm automation, background behavior, and scheduler sync state.

maintenance.title: Maintenance
maintenance.description: Keep destructive maintenance actions isolated at the bottom.

sync.not_run: No sync has been run yet.
